payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark (black-brown) leather reclining couch showing two padded seats with vertical stitched channel backrests and a cushioned armrest; the right side is edge-cropped and a small dark object (possible remote or folded cloth) sits on the arm — estimated distance ~1.0 m from the camera.
attributes: small dark object on armrest (remote or cloth)
